---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Memory Fabric makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches the memory model, retrieval, capture, or a
specific client, say which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Fit with the project

Memory Fabric is file-first, local-first, cross-tool, and ships no telemetry.
Note if your request interacts with any of those principles (see
[`ROADMAP.md`](../../ROADMAP.md) for direction).
